lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਰਾਵਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਪੀਛੈ ਲਾਗਿ ਫਿਰਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jinee meraa piaaraa raaviaa tin peechhai laag firaau |
lines.english: I follow in the footsteps of those who enjoy the Love of my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਪੰਥੁ ਦਸਾਈ ਨਿਤ ਖੜੀ ਕੋਈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦਸੇ ਤਿਨਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau panth dasaaee nit kharree koee prabh dase tin jaau |
lines.english: I stand by the wayside and ask the Way. If only someone would show me the Way to God-I would go with him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਜਨਾ ਕੋਈ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere bhaaee janaa koee mo kau har prabh mel milaae |
lines.english: O my Siblings of Destiny, please unite me in Union with my Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਮਿੰਨਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਜੋਦੜੀ ਮੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਿਲਣੈ ਕਾ ਚਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar minat kar jodarree mai prabh milanai kaa chaau |1|
lines.english: I beg of them, I implore them; I have such a yearning to meet God! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਵਾਰਿਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੀਆ ਦਿਖਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau satigur vittahu vaariaa jin har prabh deea dikhaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the True Guru, who has shown me the Lord God. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਾਣਿਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਮਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਕਰੇ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: nimaaniaa gur maan hai gur satigur kare saabaas |
lines.english: The Guru is the Honor of the dishonored. The Guru, the True Guru, brings approval and applause.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਨਿਮਾਣੀ ਢਹਿ ਪਵਾ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: hoe nimaanee dteh pavaa poore satigur paas |
lines.english: In deep humility, I fall at the Feet of the Perfect True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨੋ ਸਭ ਕੋ ਲੋਚਦਾ ਜੇਤਾ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur no sabh ko lochadaa jetaa jagat sabh koe |
lines.english: Everyone, all over the world, longs for the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ਨ ਰਜਊ ਮੈ ਮੇਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hau gur saalaeh na rjaoo mai mele har prabh paas |2|
lines.english: I am never tired of praising the Guru, who unites me with the Lord God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਣਾ ਸੋ ਥੀਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo har prabh bhaanaa so theea dhur likhiaa na mettai koe |3|
lines.english: All things happen according to the Will of the Lord God. No one can erase the pre-ordained Writ of Destiny. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਨਾ ਥੀਐ ਭਾਗਹੀਣ ਬਹਿ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin bhaagaa darasan naa theeai bhaagaheen beh roe |
lines.english: Without the good fortune of destiny, the Blessed Vision of His Darshan is not obtained. The unfortunate ones just sit and cry.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਮੇਲਸੀ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੀਛੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap deaa kar melasee gur satigur peechhai paae |
lines.english: In His Kindness, He unites us with Himself, as we follow the Guru, the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape satigur aap har aape mel milaae |
lines.english: He Himself is the True Guru; He Himself is the Lord. He Himself unites in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਜਗਿ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਲੁ ਜਲਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥੪॥੬੮॥
lines.translit: sabh jagajeevan jag aap hai naanak jal jaleh samaae |4|4|68|
lines.english: Over all the world, He is the Life of the World, O Nanak, like water mingled with water. ||4||4||68||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਇ ਪੁਛਹੁ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਤੁਸਾ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaae puchhahu sohaaganee tusaa kiau kar miliaa prabh aae |
lines.english: I go and ask the happy soul-brides, "How did you come to meet God?"

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਸੁ ਅਤਿ ਭਲਾ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਰਸੁ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ras amrit naam ras at bhalaa kit bidh milai ras khaae |
lines.english: The Essence of the Ambrosial Naam is the most sublime essence; how can I get to taste this essence?

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹ ਨ ਬੋਲਨੀ ਹਉ ਮਲਿ ਮਲਿ ਧੋਵਾ ਤਿਨ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: oe veparavaah na bolanee hau mal mal dhovaa tin paae |1|
lines.english: They are care-free and do not speak; I massage and wash their feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਜਣ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re mil sajan har gun saar |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, meet with your spiritual friend, and dwell upon the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਹੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਢੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sajan satigur purakh hai dukh kadtai haumai maar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru, the Primal Being, is your Friend, who shall drive out pain and subdue your ego. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖੀਆ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਤਿਨ ਦਇਆ ਪਈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukheea sohaaganee tin deaa pee man aae |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs are the happy soul-brides; their minds are filled with kindness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਚਨੁ ਰਤੰਨੁ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਮੰਨੇ ਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur vachan ratan hai jo mane su har ras khaae |
lines.english: The Word of the True Guru is the Jewel. One who believes in it tastes the Sublime Essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਵਣਿ ਤਿਣਿ ਸਭਤੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਗਹੀਣ ਨਹੀ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eihu har ras van tin sabhat hai bhaagaheen nahee khaae |
lines.english: This Sublime Essence of the Lord is in the forests, in the fields and everywhere, but the unfortunate ones do not taste it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਵਡ ਜਾਣੀਅਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਖਾਧਾ ਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: se vaddabhaagee vadd jaaneeeh jin har ras khaadhaa gur bhaae |2|
lines.english: Those who partake of the Lord's Sublime Essence, through the Guru's Love, are known as great and very fortunate. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪਲੈ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਰਹੇ ਬਿਲਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur palai naa pavai manamukh rahe bilalaae |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, it is not obtained. The self-willed manmukhs continue to cry in misery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਨਾ ਨਿਵਹਿ ਓਨਾ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਬਲਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: oe satigur aagai naa niveh onaa antar krodh balaae |3|
lines.english: They do not bow before the True Guru; the demon of anger is within them. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har har ras aap hai aape har ras hoe |
lines.english: The Lord Himself, Har, Har, Har, is the Sublime Essence. The Lord Himself is the Essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਵਸੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਚੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap deaa kar devasee guramukh amrit choe |
lines.english: In His Kindness, He blesses the Gurmukh with it; the Ambrosial Nectar of this Amrit trickles down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥੫॥੬੯॥
lines.translit: sabh tan man hariaa hoeaa naanak har vasiaa man soe |4|5|69|
lines.english: Then, the body and mind totally blossom forth and flourish; O Nanak, the Lord comes to dwell within the mind. ||4||5||69||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨਸੁ ਚੜੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਥਵੈ ਰੈਣਿ ਸਬਾਈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dinas charrai fir aathavai rain sabaaee jaae |
lines.english: The day dawns, and then it ends, and the night passes away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵ ਘਟੈ ਨਰੁ ਨਾ ਬੁਝੈ ਨਿਤਿ ਮੂਸਾ ਲਾਜੁ ਟੁਕਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aav ghattai nar naa bujhai nit moosaa laaj ttukaae |
lines.english: Man's life is diminishing, but he does not understand. Each day, the mouse of death is gnawing away at the rope of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁੜੁ ਮਿਠਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਪਸਰਿਆ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਲਗਿ ਮਾਖੀ ਪਚੈ ਪਚਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gurr mitthaa maaeaa pasariaa manamukh lag maakhee pachai pachaae |1|
lines.english: Maya spreads out like sweet molasses; the self-willed manmukh is stuck like a fly, rotting away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਉਬਰੇ ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਰਹੇ ਸਰਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramat har liv ubare alipat rahe saranaae |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, some embrace love for the Lord, and are saved. They remain detached and unaffected, and they find the Sanctuary of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਮੈ ਮੀਤੁ ਸਖਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re mai meet sakhaa prabh soe |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, God is my Friend and Companion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤੁ ਕਲਤੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਬਿਖੁ ਹੈ ਅੰਤਿ ਬੇਲੀ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: put kalat mohu bikh hai ant belee koe na hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Emotional attachment to children and spouse is poison; in the end, no one will go along with you as your helper. ||1||Pause||
